phase0_notes: Kinds below are the deployment-guide §1.3 taxonomy seeded as a baseline. A future Phase 0 taxonomy-discovery LLM should propose a game-specific refinement of this list, and a human must flip `human_approved` to true before Phase 1 ingest runs in production.

building.description: A constructed structure with stats, cost, requirements, and effects as required frontmatter fields.

unit.description: A controllable hero or unit with stats, abilities, progression, and requirements as required frontmatter fields.

enemy.description: A hostile creature with stats, loot_table, ai_profile, and resistances as required frontmatter fields.

mechanic.description: A core gameplay rule with formula, inputs, outputs, and edge_cases as required frontmatter fields.

system.description: A meta-system with controlled_entities, state_transitions, and progression nodes as required frontmatter fields.

location.description: A playable map or location with map_layout, objectives, difficulty, and enemy_spawns as required frontmatter fields.

npc.description: A named character with role, relationships, lore, and affiliations as required frontmatter fields.

organization.description: A faction or group with members, goals, lore, and affiliated_locations as required frontmatter fields.
